body:
Agent log at /Users/erik/Projects/ddx/.ddx/executions/20260414T215848-4a1e4817/embedded/ shows:
- Session start 21:58:48
- First llm.delta at 21:59:17 (28s TTFT — reasonable)
- ~2 events/min for 22 min
- 6 tool calls completed (all reads/ls — no code written)
- Last event at 22:20:56 (llm.request)
- No response received by 22:25+ (5+ min hang on a single chat-completion request)

Vidar host /v1/models endpoint responded instantly when probed — the host is alive, just the long-context chat-completion for this bead isn hanging. Context window bloat (plan doc + schema.graphql + bead description) may be exceeding what qwen3-coder-next can handle effectively.

Escalated to claude sonnet (background task bfu2wg460). Per user directive: vidar failures are fair game for claude retry.
summary: qwen/qwen3-coder-next stalled mid-run: 46 events in 22 min, then chat-completion request stopped responding for 5+ min. Not a 500, not a loop abort — hanging.

body:
Opus fresh-eyes review of commit 7e4ce6a.

REAL IMPLEMENTATION (not stubs):
- resolver_node.go:39 node(id): dispatches on ID prefix (node-/proj-), uses GetNodeSnapshot() / GetProjectSnapshotByID, returns Node interface (NodeInfo and Project both satisfy it), correct Relay "not found" = (nil, nil) semantics.
- resolver_node.go:61 nodeInfo: returns *NodeInfo from GetNodeSnapshot(), RFC3339 UTC times.
- resolver_node.go:70 projects: full edge list with opaque base64 cursors, after/before window, first/last, honors includeUnreachable, TotalCount is total (not windowed), HasPreviousPage/HasNextPage derived from window bounds.

CLEAN ABSTRACTION: StateProvider interface in graphql package (narrow: GetNodeSnapshot, GetProjectSnapshots, GetProjectSnapshotByID) + plain-data snapshot structs. state_graphql.go in server package adapts *ServerState. Dependency direction correct: graphql does not import server; server imports graphql.

REAL TESTS: TestGraphQLNodeInfo, TestGraphQLProjects, TestGraphQLNodeByProjectID all hit real server.New, real handleGraphQLQuery HTTP path, real gqlgen executable schema, real adapter — no mocks. All three PASS in 0.017s.

NO REGRESSIONS: resolver.go:15-281 other queries/mutations/subscriptions still panic-stub as expected. Only node/nodeInfo/projects hoisted into resolver_node.go.

VERDICT: APPROVE. Bead stays closed at 7e4ce6a.
source: opus review of 7e4ce6a (claude sonnet retry after vidar stall)
summary: APPROVE: real resolvers via clean StateProvider adapter, real integration tests passing, correct Relay cursor shape, no regressions on other panic stubs
